compositionPolicy.polite: Non-urgent summaries use role=status and a paced FIFO queue.
compositionPolicy.assertive: Only urgent interruption-worthy messages use role=alert.
compositionPolicy.dedupe: Stable keys deduplicate within the configured window; dedupe=false permits intentional repeats.
compositionPolicy.localization: Message descriptors resolve through the nearest MergoraProvider.
compositionPolicy.advantage: Independent paced priority queues, semantic-key deduplication, localization, and nested-provider reuse prevent duplicate live-region noise.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: Without Provider, announce returns false and no queue or live-region accessibility output exists; dedupe=false removes only repeat suppression for that call.
